subcodes.first_line: This is the Day whereon the countenance of Justice hath smiled, inasmuch as His Majesty - may God assist him - hath been established upon the throne of bounty [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: هذا یوم فیه ابتسم ثغر العدل بما استوی حضره السلطان ایده الله علی اریکه الفضل
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @goodly deeds; actions, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @law of fasting
